item.title: Mini Tractor vs Big Expectations
item.description: Test a mini tractor to see if it meets high expectations, showcasing performance, handling, and capabilities in real-world farming and utility tasks.

media:content.media:title: Mini Tractor vs Big Expectations
media:content.media:description: Test a mini tractor to see if it meets high expectations, showcasing performance, handling, and capabilities in real-world farming and utility tasks.

item.title: These New Tools Are a Game-Changer
item.description: Discover new tools that transform work efficiency and ease, highlighting features, benefits, and practical uses for projects and everyday tasks.

media:content.media:title: These New Tools Are a Game-Changer
media:content.media:description: Discover new tools that transform work efficiency and ease, highlighting features, benefits, and practical uses for projects and everyday tasks.

item.title: Abandoned Truck: Can We Get It Running?
item.description: Explore an abandoned truck and attempt to get it running, showing repairs, troubleshooting, and the challenges of reviving a long-unused vehicle.

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Truck: Can We Get It Running?
media:content.media:description: Explore an abandoned truck and attempt to get it running, showing repairs, troubleshooting, and the challenges of reviving a long-unused vehicle.

item.title: Welding a Project from Start to Finish
item.description: Watch the process of welding a project, including preparation, joining, and finishing techniques to create a strong and functional metal piece.

media:content.media:title: Welding a Project from Start to Finish
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of welding a project, including preparation, joining, and finishing techniques to create a strong and functional metal piece.

item.title: Driving a Tractor Without Auto Steer
item.description: Watch a demonstration of driving a tractor manually, showcasing skill and control without using auto steer for precision and efficiency on the field.

media:content.media:title: Driving a Tractor Without Auto Steer
media:content.media:description: Watch a demonstration of driving a tractor manually, showcasing skill and control without using auto steer for precision and efficiency on the field.

item.title: Fixing a Truck for the Road
item.description: Step-by-step look at repairing a truck to make it road-ready, covering essential fixes and adjustments for safe and reliable driving.

media:content.media:title: Fixing a Truck for the Road
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step look at repairing a truck to make it road-ready, covering essential fixes and adjustments for safe and reliable driving.

item.title: Feels Like a Horror Movie
item.description: Experience a tense and eerie scenario that unfolds like a horror movie, filled with suspense and unexpected twists.

media:content.media:title: Feels Like a Horror Movie
media:content.media:description: Experience a tense and eerie scenario that unfolds like a horror movie, filled with suspense and unexpected twists.

item.title: Look at All These Weeds
item.description: A closer look at an area overrun with weeds, exploring their growth, impact, and the challenge of managing them in a garden or field.

media:content.media:title: Look at All These Weeds
media:content.media:description: A closer look at an area overrun with weeds, exploring their growth, impact, and the challenge of managing them in a garden or field.

item.title: Starting a Farm on Borrowed Money
item.description: We explore the challenges and strategies of starting a farm using borrowed funds, highlighting budgeting, planning, and risk management.

media:content.media:title: Starting a Farm on Borrowed Money
media:content.media:description: We explore the challenges and strategies of starting a farm using borrowed funds, highlighting budgeting, planning, and risk management.

item.title: Everything I Brought With Me
item.description: A full overview of all the gear and essentials I carry, showcasing tools, equipment, and supplies for daily adventures or projects.

media:content.media:title: Everything I Brought With Me
media:content.media:description: A full overview of all the gear and essentials I carry, showcasing tools, equipment, and supplies for daily adventures or projects.

item.title: Covered in Grease During Work
item.description: A messy work moment as grease gets everywhere, showing the challenges and humor of hands-on projects or mechanical tasks.

media:content.media:title: Covered in Grease During Work
media:content.media:description: A messy work moment as grease gets everywhere, showing the challenges and humor of hands-on projects or mechanical tasks.

item.title: Helping a Stuck Car with a Tractor
item.description: We use a tractor to rescue a car stuck in mud, demonstrating teamwork, problem-solving, and the power of farm equipment in tough situations.

media:content.media:title: Helping a Stuck Car with a Tractor
media:content.media:description: We use a tractor to rescue a car stuck in mud, demonstrating teamwork, problem-solving, and the power of farm equipment in tough situations.

item.title: Bailing Hay Like a Pro
item.description: Watch expert hay bailing in action, demonstrating speed, technique, and efficiency to get the job done like a professional.

media:content.media:title: Bailing Hay Like a Pro
media:content.media:description: Watch expert hay bailing in action, demonstrating speed, technique, and efficiency to get the job done like a professional.

item.title: Life on the Farm
item.description: A glimpse into daily farm life, featuring fields, tractors, and essential farm activities that keep operations running smoothly.

media:content.media:title: Life on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A glimpse into daily farm life, featuring fields, tractors, and essential farm activities that keep operations running smoothly.
